title: Six-mil plug decision — founding meeting excerpt
description: Manually extracted passage from the founding meeting transcript. Covers the exchange where the group settled on 6mm wall plugs as the standard mounting method, from the bolt-system rejection through the final 'six mil' confirmation.
processingNote: Captured by hand from the auto-transcribed source. Transcript quality is poor in places (speech-to-text artefacts present); the operative phrase 'I think we go six mil hole. War, plug. Screw okay.' is clear despite surrounding noise.

anchor.note: From 'But Yoshi stuff is hanging' through the final 'The six mil? Yeah, okay.' confirmation.
